description_long: This is a large, modern bungalow with a complex roofline featuring multiple gables and dormers. The front facade is grand, with a prominent entryway, double garage, and manicured landscaping. The backyard includes a spacious patio area, a swimming pool, and a gazebo surrounded by trees and hedges, providing ample outdoor living space. The property is enclosed by a dark fence, and the grounds are neatly divided into functional zones, including a driveway, garden beds, and recreational areas. The exterior walls are light-colored, contrasting with the dark roof and trim, and numerous large windows allow for abundant natural light. The overall design is symmetrical and elegant, blending contemporary and traditional architectural elements.
description: A spacious, modern bungalow with a multi-gabled roof, large windows, a double garage, and extensive landscaped grounds featuring a pool and gazebo.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, double garage, manicured front yard, and symmetrical facade.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the backyard with a swimming pool, patio, and gazebo, as well as the length of the property.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the pool area, patio, and the line of trees and hedges at the back of the property.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the side garden, pool, gazebo, and the overall layout of the house and grounds.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with grouped side and rear windows
